title: Course progress
description: Learner state for Maestro handoffs; lives at course/progress.yaml or course/progress.json.

last_completed.description: Most recently completed lesson, or null before any lesson is finished.

oneOf.description: Chapter folder (Ch#) and lesson id (L#), e.g. Ch1/L1.

next_target.description: Optional explicit next lesson; Maestro may derive this from the spine when omitted.

notes.description: Optional freeform: blockers, skip hints, stack notes, pacing.
